name: Prism: Create Project
description: Creates a new Prism project at the given folder using the specified preset. Wraps core.projects.createProject(name, path, preset).
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode
from src.utils.prism_core import resolve_prism_core

class PrismCreateProjectNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Prism: Create Project"
    category = "DCCs"

    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/prism_icon.png"
        self.add_input("core", "any")
        self.add_input("name", "string", widget_type="text", default="My Project")
        self.add_input("path", "string", widget_type="file", default="D:/Projects/myProject")
        self.add_input("preset", "string", widget_type="text", default="Default")
        self.add_output("success", "bool")
        self.add_output("project_path", "string")

    async def execute(self, inputs):
        core = resolve_prism_core(inputs)
        if core is None:
            self.log_error("No PrismCore provided.")
            return {'success': False, 'project_path': ''}
        name = inputs.get('name') or 'Untitled'
        path = inputs.get('path') or ''
        preset = inputs.get('preset') or 'Default'
        try:
            core.projects.createProject(name, path, preset=preset)
            self.log_success(f"Created project '{name}' at {path}")
            await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
            return {'success': True, 'project_path': path}
        except Exception as e:
            self.log_error(f"createProject failed: {e}")
            return {'success': False, 'project_path': ''}

def register_node():
    return PrismCreateProjectNode
